sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Invesco's Low-Volatility ETF Distributes Quarterly Payout to Shareholders
feed.summary: The Invesco S&P International Developed Low Volatility ETF has issued a $0.2801 per share cash distribution, reinforcing its strategy of providing stability in international markets outside North America. The fund utilizes a smart-beta approach by focusing on equities with lower price fluctuations, achieving a 4.77% distribution yield and maintaining a 0.25% expense ratio. Its portfolio, which reached a 52-week high in February, is defensively structured with quarterly rebalancing to ensure it continuously holds the 200 least volatile stocks from its benchmark index.

feed.title: Vulnerability affecting F5 BIG-IP APM
feed.summary: The NCSC is urging UK organizations to address a critical unauthenticated remote code execution vulnerability (CVE-2025-53521) in F5 BIG-IP Access Policy Manager (APM), which is actively being exploited. Organizations using BIG-IP APM are advised to immediately read the security advisory, investigate for compromise, and either isolate and replace affected systems or fully rebuild them, followed by updating to the latest version and applying security hardening. The NCSC also recommends continuous threat hunting and utilizing its provided guidance and services, such as the Early Warning service and assured Cyber Incident Response providers, to secure systems.

feed.title: Global Knee Surgical Impactor Market to Reach USD 1,685.9 Million by 2036, Led by USA, China & India | Stryker, Zimmer Biomet, Johnson & Johnson Drive Precision Innovation
feed.summary: The global knee surgical impactor market is projected to grow to USD 1,685.9 million by 2036, exhibiting a 10.0% CAGR, driven by an aging population, rising osteoarthritis cases, and the need for precision in Total Knee Arthroplasty (TKA). The market, currently valued at USD 650.0 million in 2026, is seeing strong demand for advanced pneumatic and electro-pneumatic systems to ensure consistent implant alignment and reduce surgeon fatigue. The USA, China, and India are leading this growth, with companies like Stryker, Zimmer Biomet, and Johnson & Johnson spearheading innovation.

feed.title: Sysco’s Jetro deal aims to add 125+ warehouse stores across the U.S.
feed.summary: Sysco (NYSE:SYY) has agreed to acquire Jetro Restaurant Depot for approximately $29.1 billion in cash and stock, aiming to expand into the Cash & Carry channel with 166 warehouses and access to 725,000 independent customers. The deal, expected to close by Q3 fiscal 2027, is projected to be immediately accretive to EPS and margins, generating $250 million in annual synergies within three years. Sysco plans to fund the acquisition primarily with new debt, pause share buybacks for deleveraging, and potentially open over 125 new Jetro locations in the future.

feed.title: Apple subsidiary fined £390K for Russian sanctions breaches
feed.summary: Apple Distribution International (ADI), a subsidiary of Apple, has been fined £390,000 by Britain's sanctions watchdog for making two payments totaling over £635,000 to Okko, a Russian streaming platform. These payments occurred in June and July 2022, after Okko's former owner, Sberbank, was sanctioned by the U.K. in April 2022. ADI, based in Ireland, voluntarily disclosed the breaches, and the Office for Financial Sanctions Implementation clarified that Apple Inc. itself did not commit any breaches.

feed.title: Jefferies Adjusts Price Target on General Mills to $36 From $37, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has adjusted its price target for General Mills (NYSE: GIS) to $36, down from the previous $37, while maintaining a Hold rating on the stock. This revision reflects an updated valuation perspective from the firm.

feed.title: Should You Buy Bristol-Myers Squibb Company (NYSE:BMY) For Its Upcoming Dividend?
feed.summary: Bristol-Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) is set to go ex-dividend in two days, with a per-share dividend payment of US$0.63, resulting in a trailing yield of 4.3%. The company's dividend appears sustainable, backed by both strong earnings growth of 13% annually over the last five years and a healthy payout ratio from cash flow. Investors may find this combination of growing earnings, a sustainable dividend, and a reasonable payout ratio appealing.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks Chairman & CEO Acquires 6.6% More Stock
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks' (NASDAQ: PANW) Chairman and CEO, Nikesh Arora, recently purchased US$10.0m worth of company stock at US$147 per share, increasing his holding by 6.6%. This significant insider purchase suggests strong conviction in the company's future, reinforcing the positive sentiment derived from insider transactions over the past year and the existing high insider ownership of 0.7% (worth approximately US$878m).

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts PT on Travelers Companies to $299 From $294, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has updated its price target for Travelers Companies (TRV), increasing it to $299 from the previous $294, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other recent analyst price target changes and news regarding insider transactions and company developments for The Travelers Companies, Inc. The article also provides a company profile and financial data for Travelers.

feed.title: Sysco Nears $29 Billion Deal to Buy Restaurant Depot, WSJ Says
feed.summary: Sysco Corp., a major US food distributor, is reportedly nearing a $29 billion acquisition of privately held Restaurant Depot LLC, including debt. The Wall Street Journal, citing unnamed sources, stated that the deal could be announced later on Monday and values Restaurant Depot at over 14 times its operating income.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs initiates Qualcomm stock coverage with neutral rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has initiated coverage on Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) with a Neutral rating and a price target of $135.00, suggesting a 4% upside from its current trading price of $127.11. The firm acknowledges Qualcomm's efforts to diversify revenue beyond smartphone processors into areas like automotive and PCs, but notes that share loss from key smartphone customers like Apple and Chinese OEMs will be a headwind. Despite recent downgrades from other analysts and market challenges, Qualcomm also announced a $20 billion share buyback program and an increased quarterly dividend.

feed.title: HDFC Bank Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 30 Mar 2026
feed.summary: HDFC Bank Ltd. experienced a significant decline, hitting an intraday low of Rs 729.9 on March 30, 2026, amid broader sector weakness and negative market sentiment. The stock's performance reflects a downward trend, trading below key moving averages, with technical indicators suggesting bearish momentum despite an improved Mojo Score to 'Hold'. This underperformance has been sustained, with the stock lagging behind the Sensex across various timeframes.

feed.title: Thompson Investment Management Inc. Buys 59,613 Shares of Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. $ARE
feed.summary: Thompson Investment Management Inc. increased its stake in Alexandria Real Estate Equities (NYSE:ARE) by 53% in Q4, acquiring 59,613 additional shares to hold 172,094 shares valued at $8.42 million. Company chairman Joel S. Marcus also bought 25,000 shares in February, increasing his direct holdings. Alexandria Real Estate Equities announced a $500 million share repurchase plan and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.72 per share, representing an annualized dividend of $2.88 and a 6.3% yield.

feed.title: Goelzer Investment Management Inc. Cuts Holdings in Apollo Global Management Inc. $APO
feed.summary: Goelzer Investment Management Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Apollo Global Management Inc. by 84.1% during the fourth quarter, selling 29,108 shares to end with 5,518 shares valued at $799,000. Despite this, Apollo Global Management reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $158.13. However, the company faces legal and reputational risks due to ongoing securities class action lawsuits related to "Epstein Files" revelations, which are creating negative market sentiment and could pressure the stock price.

feed.title: Thompson Investment Management Inc. Acquires 14,673 Shares of Procter & Gamble Company (The) $PG
feed.summary: Thompson Investment Management Inc. significantly increased its stake in Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) by 64.7% in the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 14,673 shares. This raises their total holdings to 37,336 shares, valued at approximately $5.35 million. Despite this institutional buying, corporate insiders have recently sold 348,618 shares worth about $55.46 million, reducing their ownership to just 0.20%.

feed.title: Goelzer Investment Management Inc. Buys Shares of 14,800 Evergy Inc. $EVRG
feed.summary: Goelzer Investment Management Inc. has purchased a new stake of 14,800 shares in Evergy Inc. (NASDAQ:EVRG), valued at approximately $1.07 million during the fourth quarter. This move aligns with a "Moderate Buy" sentiment from Wall Street analysts, who have an average consensus target price of $87.75 for the utility stock. While institutional investors now own 87.24% of Evergy, some insiders have sold shares, and the company offers a quarterly dividend of $0.695, equating to an annual yield of 3.4%.

feed.title: iShares International Treasury Bond ETF $IGOV Shares Sold by JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. significantly reduced its stake in the iShares International Treasury Bond ETF (IGOV) by 96.5% during the third quarter, selling over 5.4 million shares. Despite this, other hedge funds, including Cetera Investment Advisers, Quadrature Capital Ltd, and Leuthold Group LLC, have either increased their positions or acquired new stakes in IGOV. The ETF tracks an index of international government bonds and recently opened at $40.54.

feed.title: LKQ Corporation $LKQ Shares Bought by Thompson Investment Management Inc.
feed.summary: Thompson Investment Management Inc. increased its stake in LKQ Corporation by 14.0% during the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 46,052 shares to hold a total of 374,299 shares valued at $11.3 million. This makes LKQ its 17th largest holding, representing approximately 1.4% of the fund's portfolio. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in LKQ, with several increasing their holdings significantly.

feed.title: Artificial Intelligence at JPMorgan Chase
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase is heavily investing in AI, with an annual technology budget exceeding $18 billion. The bank utilizes AI for over 450 use cases to enhance efficiency, innovation, and risk management, aiming for 1,000 by 2026. This article highlights two key applications: using a proprietary LLM Suite for generative AI to boost employee productivity and leveraging the OmniAI platform for real-time fraud detection, resulting in significant efficiency gains and loss prevention.

feed.title: FDA clears Medtronic’s Stealth Axis system for cranial and ENT procedures
feed.summary: Medtronic's Stealth Axis surgical system has received FDA clearance for use in cranial and ENT procedures, building on its prior clearance for spine applications. The system integrates surgical planning, navigation, and robotics, powered by AI, to enhance precision and provide real-time insights for surgeons. Medtronic considers Stealth Axis a core component of its AiBLE ecosystem, aiming to improve pre-, intra-, and post-operative workflows.

feed.title: Form FWP Citigroup Global Markets Filed by: Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc.
feed.summary: Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc., guaranteed by Citigroup Inc., has filed a Form FWP for 1.5 Year Enhanced Barrier Digital Securities linked to the performance of the Nasdaq-100, Russell 2000, and S&P 500 indices. These securities offer a digital return amount of at least 15.50% if the worst-performing underlying index is above its final barrier value of 70% on the valuation date, but investors risk significant loss if it falls below this threshold. The offering involves various risks, including the potential loss of principal, no interest payments, and dependency on the worst performer among the multiple underlying assets.

feed.title: Amphenol Prices €500 Million 3.625% Senior Notes Due 2031 to Refinance 2026 Debt
feed.summary: Amphenol, through its subsidiary Amphenol Technologies, has successfully priced €500 million of 3.625% senior unsecured notes due March 30, 2031. The net proceeds, approximately €496.1 million, will be used to repay the company’s existing 0.750% Euro Senior Notes due in 2026 and for general corporate purposes. The notes, guaranteed by Amphenol, were issued under a shelf registration with U.S. Bank Trust Company as trustee and are approved for listing on Euronext Dublin’s Global Exchange Market.

feed.title: News Corp updates daily disclosure on $1bn repurchase program; ~$148.9m bought to date
feed.summary: News Corp has updated its daily ASX notifications regarding its US$1 billion 2025 repurchase program, showing approximately US$148.85 million has been purchased to date. The company is authorized to repurchase up to US$1.0 billion of Class A and Class B shares. Daily filings for March 27, 2026, detail specific share purchases and consideration paid, executed through brokers like Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC to enhance shareholder value.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Boston Scientific Corporation (BSX)
feed.summary: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX), alleging the company made false and misleading statements regarding its revenue outlook, growth, and market share between July 23, 2025, and February 3, 2026. Investors who purchased Boston Scientific stock during this period and suffered substantial losses have until May 4, 2026, to seek appointment as lead plaintiff. The lawsuit highlights a significant drop in Boston Scientific's stock price following its Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results announcement on February 4, 2026, which reported lower-than-guidance EPS.

feed.title: Equinix stock trades flat as company highlights responsible water use in data centers
feed.summary: Equinix (EQIX) stock traded flat after the company published a guide on responsible water use in data centers. The company detailed its water consumption measurement and efforts to find alternative sources to reduce potable water demand. EQIX remains in a strong medium- and long-term uptrend, with technical indicators supporting continued upward movement, despite short-term consolidation expected between $955 and $975.

feed.title: Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) doubles energy reach with $2.4B Entrust deal
feed.summary: Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) has successfully completed its $2.4 billion acquisition of ENTRUST Solutions Group, significantly expanding its presence in the energy infrastructure market. The deal adds over 3,100 professionals in electric grid and natural gas infrastructure, bolstering Leidos' capabilities in power delivery engineering and broadening its utility customer base. This acquisition aligns with Leidos' NorthStar 2030 strategy, supporting its energy growth pillar and enhancing its position as a provider of grid modernization solutions.

feed.title: Herbalife Acquires Bioniq Assets To Expand Personalization
feed.summary: Herbalife Ltd. has announced its acquisition of certain assets from UK-based Bioniq, including its personalization engine and biomarker database, for $55 million in base payments and up to $95 million in contingent consideration. The acquisition, expected to close in Q2 2026, aims to enhance Herbalife's personalized supplement offerings through its global network, starting in Europe and the U.S. This move expands Herbalife's capabilities in personalized nutrition.

feed.title: Nova R Wealth Inc. Buys 16,360 Shares of Walmart Inc. $WMT
feed.summary: Nova R Wealth Inc. significantly increased its stake in Walmart Inc. during the fourth quarter, adding 16,360 shares to hold a total of 20,514 shares valued at $2.29 million. Despite recent insider selling by top executives, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for Walmart, with a consensus price target of $135.76. The company reported a slight earnings beat and revenue growth, and continues to attract institutional investment.

feed.title: Spire Wealth Management Acquires 1,876 Shares of Lockheed Martin Corporation $LMT
feed.summary: Spire Wealth Management increased its stake in Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) by 36.4% in the fourth quarter, now holding 7,034 shares valued at $3.402 million. Analyst sentiment is mixed, with a "Hold" consensus rating and an average price target of $623.16. Lockheed Martin reported Q4 revenue of $20.32 billion (exceeding estimates) but an EPS miss of $5.80 versus $6.33 consensus.

feed.title: 120,469 Shares in Global Net Lease, Inc. $GNL Purchased by Redhawk Wealth Advisors Inc.
feed.summary: Redhawk Wealth Advisors Inc. recently acquired 120,469 shares of Global Net Lease, Inc. (GNL) valued at approximately $1.04 million, representing 0.05% ownership. This coincides with other institutional investors also increasing their stakes in GNL. The article notes GNL's recent quarterly dividend of $0.19, an 8.3% yield, and a consensus "Buy" rating from analysts with a target price of $10.00.

feed.title: Spire Wealth Management Boosts Holdings in The Walt Disney Company $DIS
feed.summary: Spire Wealth Management significantly increased its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 72.9% in Q4, acquiring an additional 9,194 shares and bringing its total holdings to 21,800 shares valued at approximately $2.48 million. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus for Disney, despite recent price target reductions by some firms. The company reported an earnings beat, but strategic setbacks like the cancellation of the OpenAI Sora project and challenges in gaming exposure have raised investor concerns.

feed.title: Spire Wealth Management Acquires 9,207 Shares of Qualcomm Incorporated $QCOM
feed.summary: Spire Wealth Management significantly increased its stake in Qualcomm Incorporated by 187.3% in the fourth quarter, purchasing 9,207 shares to own a total of 14,123 shares valued at $2.416 million. Qualcomm has demonstrated strong financial performance, beating earnings estimates and announcing a $20 billion share buyback program and a quarterly dividend of $0.89. Despite mixed analyst ratings, the company is attracting investor attention due to its leadership in AI-related technology and positive earnings results.

feed.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Boosts Holdings in Graco Inc. $GGG
feed.summary: SG Americas Securities LLC significantly increased its stake in Graco Inc. by 186% to 123,655 shares, valued at approximately $10.14 million, as institutional investors now own nearly 94% of the company. Graco reported strong Q4 earnings, meeting EPS estimates and exceeding revenue forecasts, leading its board to approve a 15-million share buyback and declare a dividend. Despite insider selling, analyst sentiment remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $96.50.

feed.title: Spire Wealth Management Buys 7,156 Shares of Chubb Limited $CB
feed.summary: Spire Wealth Management significantly increased its stake in Chubb Limited (NYSE:CB) by 490.5% in the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 7,156 shares to hold a total of 8,615 shares valued at approximately $2.69 million. Despite this institutional buying, Chubb insiders, including EVP Timothy Boroughs and CEO Evan Greenberg, have been net sellers in the last 90 days. Chubb exceeded Q4 EPS estimates and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.97, with analysts maintaining an average "Hold" rating and a target price of $342.05.

feed.title: Uber (WRD) reports 56.6M WeRide shares; 5.82% ownership
feed.summary: Uber Technologies, Inc. has disclosed a 5.82% beneficial ownership in WeRide Inc., totaling 56,618,266 Class A ordinary shares. This stake is held through its wholly-owned subsidiary, SMB Holding Corporation, and includes both direct Class A shares and Class A shares underlying American Depositary Shares (ADSs). The ownership percentage is calculated based on WeRide's 972,294,941 Class A ordinary shares issued as of March 24, 2026.

feed.title: ICICI Bank Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amidst Market Downtrend
feed.summary: Despite ICICI Bank hitting a new 52-week low, its derivatives segment saw a significant 13.3% increase in open interest, indicating heightened market activity and repositioning by traders. This surge, coupled with rising delivery volumes and a 'Hold' rating from Mojo Score, suggests potential for future volatility or directional movement, even as the stock trades below key moving averages. Investors are advised to balance the improved outlook with current price weakness and sector headwinds.

feed.title: M&T's new Philadelphia market president looks to expand SBA lending, wealth management
feed.summary: M&T Bank has named Denise Monahan as its new Philadelphia regional president, with a focus on expanding small business lending and wealth management. Monahan, a South Philadelphia native, will lead these initiatives as M&T Bank aims to grow its local market share, currently ranking 11th. The appointment signifies the bank's commitment to strategic growth in the Philadelphia area.

feed.title: Apple at 50: How a garage startup became a $3.5-trillion titan
feed.summary: Apple is celebrating its 50th anniversary, marking its transformation from a garage startup into a $3.5-trillion technology giant with 2.5 billion active devices globally. Co-founded by Steve Wozniak, Steve Jobs, and Ron Wayne in 1976, the company achieved its success through an intense focus on design, privacy, and excellence, fostering fierce customer loyalty. Despite past financial troubles and leadership changes, including the return of Steve Jobs and the subsequent death of Jobs, Apple has continually innovated with products like the iPhone and expanded into services like Apple TV+, cementing its status as a cultural icon.

feed.title: IDEAYA moves new cancer drug combo into patients after early lung tumor responses
feed.summary: IDEAYA Biosciences announced it has initiated a Phase 1 combination study of its cancer drug IDE849 (a DLL3-targeting TOP1 ADC) and IDE161 (a PARG inhibitor) for DLL3-upregulated solid tumors, including small cell lung cancer (SCLC), neuroendocrine tumors (NETs), neuroendocrine carcinomas (NECs), and melanoma. This follows promising early monotherapy results of IDE849, which showed multiple partial responses in an expansion cohort, including 3 out of 4 SCLC patients. The company expects to provide a clinical data update for both monotherapy and combination treatments in the second half of 2026.

feed.title: IDEAYA Biosciences Announces First-Patient-In for Phase 1 Combination Study of IDE849, DLL3 TOP1 ADC, and IDE161, PARG Inhibitor, in DLL3 Upregulated Solid Tumor Indications, including SCLC, NETs, NECs, and Melanoma
feed.summary: IDEAYA Biosciences has initiated a Phase 1 clinical trial evaluating the combination of IDE849 (a DLL3 TOP1 ADC) and IDE161 (a PARG inhibitor) for DLL3 upregulated solid tumors, including SCLC, NETs, NECs, and melanoma. This first-in-class combination aims to enhance the efficacy and durability of TOP1 ADCs by leveraging the DNA damage repair pathway. The company anticipates providing an update on both monotherapy IDE849 and the IDE849/IDE161 combination clinical data in the second half of 2026.

feed.title: Leidos expands into utility grid and gas work with $2.4B buy
feed.summary: Leidos (NYSE:LDOS) has completed its $2.4 billion acquisition of ENTRUST Solutions Group, significantly expanding its presence in the energy infrastructure market. This acquisition doubles Leidos' energy footprint, adding over 3,100 professionals and broadening its engineering capabilities and utility customer base, aligning with its NorthStar 2030 strategy for grid modernization. The deal positions Leidos as a stronger provider of power engineering and design services, addressing growing electricity demand and resilience requirements.

feed.title: Exclusive | Sysco to Buy Restaurant Depot in $29 Billion Deal
feed.summary: Sysco, the largest U.S. food distributor, is reportedly finalizing a deal to acquire family-owned Restaurant Depot for approximately $29 billion, including debt. The acquisition terms, expected to be announced soon, indicate that Restaurant Depot shareholders would receive $21.6 billion in cash and 91.5 million Sysco shares, valuing the deal at a multiple of over 14 times Restaurant Depot’s operating income. Restaurant Depot primarily serves smaller businesses like delis and independent caterers across the U.S.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target on Dow to $48 From $45, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has increased its price target for Dow Inc. (DOW) to $48 from $45, while maintaining an "Equalweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from the analyst firm. The article also briefly mentions recent analyst adjustments from UBS and Mizuho Securities, indicating ongoing re-evaluations of Dow's stock.

feed.title: PV Cell Maker Yingfa Ruineng Seeks Hong Kong IPO, Backed By China's National Green Fund
feed.summary: Yingfa Ruineng, a Chinese N-type solar cell manufacturer, is pursuing a Hong Kong IPO, having returned to profitability in 2025 with significant backing from China's National Green Fund. The company has benefited from China's efforts to curb overcapacity in the solar industry, leading to higher margins, especially in overseas markets like the U.S. Yingfa Ruineng's shift from P-type to higher-efficiency N-type cells has been a key driver of its success and expansion.

feed.title: Oracle Scales Up Nashville Offices to Support Rapid Growth
feed.summary: Oracle has signed a new lease for over 116,000 square feet in Nashville's Neuhoff District to accommodate the rapid growth of its workforce, bringing its total office capacity in the city to approximately 2,000 seats across three locations. This expansion reinforces Oracle's commitment to job creation and innovation in Nashville, with teams focusing on cloud engineering, software development, and product management. The company is actively recruiting new talent and fostering community engagement through partnerships with local educational institutions.

feed.title: HSBC Holdings, Others Reportedly Help French Startup Mistral Raise $830 Million in Debt to Build AI Data Center
feed.summary: HSBC Holdings and other entities have reportedly assisted French startup Mistral in securing $830 million in debt financing. This significant funding is intended to be used by Mistral for the construction of an artificial intelligence (AI) data center. The news highlights increasing investment in AI infrastructure, with major financial institutions supporting the growth of AI startups.

feed.title: Industry’s first at-bit imaging system successfully images over 5,300 ft of wellbore
feed.summary: SLB's Retina™ at-bit imaging system successfully imaged over 5,300 ft of a horizontal well in the Midland Basin, providing unprecedented geological insights. This technology embedded sensors in the drill bit to identify natural fractures and thin laminations, improving reservoir characterization and future well planning without affecting drilling performance. The system also delivered high-frequency shock and vibration data for operational optimization.

feed.title: o9: Modernising Hormel Food's Global Supply Chain
feed.summary: Hormel Foods has partnered with o9 Solutions to transform its global supply chain, aiming for improved demand planning and operational efficiency through an AI-powered digital platform. This initiative addresses complexities like perishability and seasonal demand in the food industry, enabling better forecasting, inventory management, and collaboration across its extensive network. The phased implementation, supported by Accenture, enhances Hormel's ability to operate proactively and drive growth.

feed.title: Raymond James Adjusts Price Target on Boston Scientific to $88 From $97, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Raymond James has adjusted its price target for Boston Scientific (BSX) to $88, down from the previous $97, while reiterating an Outperform rating on the stock. This revision comes as the firm maintains its positive outlook on the medical technology company.

feed.title: Fortive Corporation $FTV Stake Increased by SG Americas Securities LLC
feed.summary: SG Americas Securities LLC significantly increased its stake in Fortive Corporation (NYSE:FTV) by 116.7% in the fourth quarter, now holding 174,386 shares valued at $9.63 million. Fortive also reported strong Q4 earnings, beating expectations with $0.90 EPS and $1.12 billion in revenue, and provided optimistic FY 2026 guidance. Despite a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts, institutional investors collectively own nearly 95% of the company's stock.
